name: QuantumKore Inc.
summary: QuantumKore Inc. provides technology solutions related to the waste conversion process and energy sector. It engages in the research and development of technology solutions related to desulphurization of fuels, nano emulsions, and waste to energy. The company was formerly known as SuperBox Inc. and changed its name to QuantumKore Inc. in March 2021. QuantumKore Inc. was incorporated in 1999 and is based in Oceanside, New York.
